methodology: Platform-product OKRs with customer outcomes and explicit team ownership.
description: Archived quarterly Objectives covering the prior two years before the current quarter.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe internal-customer and engineering-system outcomes, not platform feature shipping alone.
Key results are grouped under a small number of company objectives.
Every key result has explicit team ownership.

companyObjectives.title: Archive Establish a usable shared engineering foundation
companyObjectives.statement: Focus archived periods on making shared runtime, delivery, and onboarding capabilities reliable enough for broad platform adoption.

keyResults.target: Move onboarding from bespoke consulting toward a reusable platform path
keyResults.baseline: Each new team required heavy manual setup support
keyResults.statement: Reduce onboarding time by standardizing templates, service metadata, and runtime bootstrap flows.
keyResults.companyObjectiveTitle: Establish a usable shared engineering foundation

executingTeams.intent: Standardize supported starting points and migrations.

supportingTeams.intent: Improve platform discovery and ownership clarity.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Archived outcome pursued through progressive maturation of the foundation.

keyResults.target: Make the shared delivery path materially faster than local bespoke tooling
keyResults.baseline: Delivery paths varied widely across teams
keyResults.statement: Reduce lead time for change by improving shared pipeline quality, runtime provisioning, and deployment consistency.
keyResults.companyObjectiveTitle: Establish a usable shared engineering foundation

executingTeams.intent: Improve the shared CI/CD and release path.

supportingTeams.intent: Standardize runtime setup and reduce environment delays.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Archived outcome depended on multiple platform product areas maturing together.

companyObjectives.title: Archive Raise the safety and operability baseline
companyObjectives.statement: Focus archived periods on embedding guardrails, telemetry, and incident discipline into the standard path rather than relying on manual governance and heroics.

keyResults.target: Increase standard identity, artifact, and policy coverage across production services
keyResults.baseline: Control coverage depended on local team maturity and manual reviews
keyResults.statement: Increase baseline control coverage by encoding more security and compliance expectations into the shared path.
keyResults.companyObjectiveTitle: Raise the safety and operability baseline

executingTeams.intent: Move common controls into templates, delivery automation, and supported runtime defaults.

supportingTeams.intent: Bake stronger controls into the default service path.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Archived outcome was achieved through incremental guardrail improvements.

keyResults.metric: Incident MTTR for common platform failure classes
keyResults.target: Make response to shared-platform incidents more repeatable and less improvisational
keyResults.baseline: Telemetry quality and ownership data varied across the estate
keyResults.statement: Reduce incident MTTR by standardizing service telemetry, routing, and remediation workflows.
keyResults.companyObjectiveTitle: Raise the safety and operability baseline

executingTeams.intent: Improve telemetry, routing, and incident response automation.

supportingTeams.intent: Provide service ownership and dependency visibility used during response.

keyResults.commitmentRationale: Archived outcome came from repeated operational hardening rather than a single change.
